creator: S.M. Cantrell

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight text-zinc-50
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif tracking-tight text-zinc-100
rules.anti_pattern_avoided: No Inter or default sans used for headings to preserve the literary aesthetic.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, cinematic margins, bento grids for data.

grid_modes.story_bible: Bento layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6), mixing span-8 hero areas with span-4 supporting cards.
grid_modes.chat_interface: Centrally focused max-w-4xl container with 'Crystal Glass' floating input at bottom.

surface_styles.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050507]/60 border-b border-white/5
surface_styles.cards: Neumorphic/Tactile blend: flat #0C0C11 background, 1px subtle white/5 border, shadow-2xl for depth, NO standard gray gradients.
surface_styles.inputs: Glassmorphism with 1px border-white/10 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37]/50

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#F0C84B] transition-colors rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-zinc-300 hover:text-white hover:border-white/30 rounded-sm

shadcn_overrides.card: Remove default rounded-xl if needed, use sharp or max rounded-md for literary edge. Add border-white/5.
shadcn_overrides.dialog: Dark glass overlay, #14141A background, subtle noise texture.
shadcn_overrides.tabs: Override h-9, use border-b styling rather than pill shapes to feel more like a manuscript.

motion.interactions: Subtle, smooth. Hover states lift slightly (-translate-y-[2px]) and borders glow.
motion.page_transitions: Fade and gentle slide up using Framer Motion.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Muted text must remain readable. #A1A1AA on #0C0C11 is safe.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., 'generate-story-button', 'chat-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and 'Jewel & Luxury' archetype.
Ensure the fonts 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' are loaded (via Google Fonts or similar).
Build the Chat Interface with a floating bottom input using the defined 'glass_bg' style.
For the Story Bible, implement a Bento Grid layout for visual interest.
DO NOT use generic Shadcn pill-shaped buttons; apply the specific button styles with sharper edges.
Use Framer Motion to animate message bubbles and bento grid item entrances.
Implement data-testid attributes universally for testing.
Ensure S.M. Cantrell is credited in the UI (e.g., footer or about section).
